description: Testing multi-keyword search functionality including various input scenarios, character types, and search result handling

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check default display of input box item
expected_result:
Display correctly as designed:
+ Position
+ Label of item
+ Default value: blank
+ Place holder value
...

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Search with each special values:
+ Null (blank value)
+ Multi spaces only
expected_result: Display all search results.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Search with value:
+ "0"
expected_result:
Search LIKE %keyword% correctly 
+ Highlight results base on spec.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Search with 1 keyword in cases:
+ Keyword = DB's value
+ Keyword includes DB's value
+ DB's value includes keyword
expected_result:
Search LIKE %keyword% correctly 
+ Highlight results base on spec.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Search with multi keywords in cases:
+ At least 1 keyword = DB's value
+ At least 1 keyword includes DB's value
+ DB's value includes at least 1 keyword
expected_result:
Search LIKE each %keyword% correctly 
+ Highlight results base on spec.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Search with:
+ Valid characters
+ Lower case/Upper case
+ English characters
+ Half/full-width Japanese
+ Unicode, Chinese...
expected_result:
Search LIKE %keyword% correctly 
+ Highlight results base on spec.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Search with:
+ Special characters: ~!@#$%^&*()_+{}:"|<>?,./;'[]`
expected_result:
Search LIKE %keyword% correctly 
+ Highlight results base on spec.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Search in 2 cases:
+ Input Japanese string from keyboard => Enter to finish input
+ Copy paste Japanese string
expected_result: 2 case have the same search handling.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Search when has redundant spaces at:
+ At the begin/end of keystring
expected_result:
Search LIKE %keyword% correctly 
+ Highlight results base on spec.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Search when has redundant spaces at:
+ Between keystring
expected_result:
Search LIKE %keyword% correctly 
+ Highlight results base on spec.

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check when input invalid character [Base on each spec]
expected_result: Display exact error message with correct format and position

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check message content when has search result
expected_result: Display exact message with correct format and position

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check message content when has no search result
expected_result: Display exact message with correct format and position

description: Testing email input validation including syntax, length limits, special characters, and database-related validations across different forms

test_view_points.viewpoint:
[Add new form]
Check default display of input item
expected_result:
Display correctly as designed:
+ Position
+ Label of item
+ Default value: blank
+ Place holder value
...

test_view_points.viewpoint:
[Edit form]
Check default display of input item
expected_result:
Display correctly as designed:
+ Position
+ Label of item
+ Default value: DB's value

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check when input valid Email:
+ Normal email value with valid characters: Number, Alphabet, valid symbols...
+ Has redudant spaces at the beginning/at the end of Email value
expected_result: Process successfully with inputed value

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check when input [max length -1] / [max length] local part value
expected_result: Process successfully with inputed value

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check when input [max length -1] / [max length] domain value
expected_result: Process successfully with inputed value

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check when input each invalid syntax of email:
+ Lack "@" in Email
+ Redundant "@" in Email
+ Has ".." in Email
+ Has "." at the end of Email
+ Has "." at the end of local part
+ Has "@" at the end of Email
+ Has "-" after "@"
+ Local part is NULL
+ Domain part is NULL
expected_result: Display exact error message with correct format and position

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check when input each invalid value email:
+ Input SQL injection
+ Input HTML (Scripts)
+ Include invalid character 
+ Include unicode character
+ Include half-width characters
+ Include full-width characters
expected_result: Display exact error message with correct format and position

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check when input over boundary value:
+ Local > Max value (64 characters)
+ Domain part > Max value (255 characters)
expected_result: Display exact error message with correct format and position

test_view_points.viewpoint:
[Login function/Edit]
Check when input invalid Email:
+ Email doesn't exist in Database
expected_result: Display exact error message with correct format and position

test_view_points.viewpoint:
[SignUp function] 
Check when input invalid Email:
+ Email exist in Database
expected_result: Display exact error message with correct format and position

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check when not input value/multi spaces
expected_result: Success or failure base on spec
